claims.name: Legacy task-pool size
claims.statement: The legacy task pool used for the Gemma-3-27B and Qwen-3.5-122B probe-training measurements contains 10,000 pairwise-compared tasks drawn from WildChat, Alpaca, MATH, BailBench, and STRESS-TEST.

claims.name: Canonical split total size
claims.statement: The canonical persona-sweep split contains 6,000 tasks total, partitioned into 4,000 train / 1,000 eval / 1,000 test.

claims.name: Canonical split train size
claims.statement: The canonical persona-sweep split reserves 4,000 tasks for probe training per persona.

claims.name: Canonical split eval size
claims.statement: The canonical persona-sweep split reserves 1,000 tasks for cross-persona probe evaluation.

claims.name: Canonical split test size
claims.statement: The canonical persona-sweep split reserves 1,000 tasks as a final holdout.

claims.name: Gemma classification probe layer
claims.statement: The Gemma-3-27B classification probe is trained on residual-stream activations at layer 32, at the final prompt token.

claims.name: Gemma steering probe layer
claims.statement: Gemma-3-27B contrastive steering is applied at residual-stream layer 25.

claims.name: Qwen classification probe layer
claims.statement: The Qwen-3.5-122B classification probe is trained at residual-stream layer 38, one token before the turn boundary (tb-1).

claims.name: Persona modulation truth prompt count
claims.statement: The full persona-modulation stimulus set covers 9 system-prompt variants in the truth domain.

claims.name: Persona modulation harm prompt count
claims.statement: The full persona-modulation stimulus set covers 5 system-prompt variants in the harm domain.

claims.name: Persona modulation politics prompt count
claims.statement: The full persona-modulation stimulus set covers 9 system-prompt variants in the politics domain.

claims.name: Persona modulation total prompt count
claims.statement: The full persona-modulation stimulus set covers 23 system-prompt variants across truth (9), harm (5), and politics (9).
